definition:
1. a putting aside  or away, banishing, relegatio , (Plato Philosophus), etc. 
2. a setting out  things for sale, retail-trade , (Aristotle Philosopher) 
3.  παρίσταμαι); intransitive a being beside : 
4. a position  or post near  a king, (Xenophon Historicus) 
5. presence of mind, courage , (Polybius Historicus): also, desperation , (Polybius Historicus) 
6. as law-term, a small money deposit  on entering law-suits, (Isaeus Orator) (ML)
